description:
Three regional e-commerce websites were recently imported into this Matomo instance but were configured with incorrect settings. The sites are named 'UK Fashion Store', 'German Auto Parts', and 'Tokyo Electronics'. All three are currently set to the wrong currency and timezone for their geographic regions, and e-commerce revenue tracking has not been enabled on any of them.

Your task: correct the currency and timezone for each site to match its geographic region, and enable e-commerce tracking on all three. Do not modify any other sites (especially 'Initial Site').

Login credentials: admin / Admin12345
